---
title: "ደ/ብርሃን ቅ/ሥላሴ ዳላስ ቴክሳስ"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    fig-width: 10
    fig-asp: 0.3
brand:
  light: brand/light.yml
  dark: brand/dark.yml
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{=html}
<head>
      <style>
        nav.navbar.navbar-expand-md.slim {
          display: none;
        }
      </style>
    </head>
```

```{=html}
<!-- <link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bootstrap/5.3.0/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet"> -->
<link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css" rel="stylesheet">

<style>

.info-btn {
  /* background: none;  <-- REMOVE OR COMMENT OUT THIS LINE */
 /* background-color: #ffffff;  Add this line to make the outer circle white */
  border: none;
  /*color: #6c757d;  This is the color of the 'i' icon and its inner circle */
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  padding: 0.5rem; /* This padding creates the size of the white circle */
  border-radius: 40%;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  position: fixed;
  top: 15px;
  right: 20px;
  z-index: 1050;
  
  background-color: #7e8f9e;
  border: none;
  color: #292a33;
}

.info-btn:hover {
    background-color: #e9ecef;
    color: #495057;
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.info-btn .fas { /* Target the Font Awesome icon directly */
  /* vertical-align: middle; */ /* Try this first */
  /* If 'middle' isn't enough, you might need a slight adjustment */
  vertical-align: -3px;  /* Example: push down by 2 pixels */
}
.modal-header {
    background-color: #f8f9fa;
    border-bottom: 2px solid #dee2e6;
}

.modal-title {
    color: #2c3e50;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.section-title {
    color: #495057;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-top: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    padding-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.citation-text {
    background-color: #f8f9fa;
    padding: 0.75rem;
    border-left: 4px solid #007bff;
    font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
}
</style>

<!-- Info Button -->
<button id="infoBtn" class="info-btn" type="button" data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#infoModal" title="About This Dashboard">
    <i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i>
</button>

<!-- Info Modal -->
<div class="modal fade" id="infoModal" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="infoModalLabel" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
        <div class="modal-content">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <h5 class="modal-title" id="infoModalLabel">
                    <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>
                    About This Dashboard
                </h5>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close"></button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body">
                <div class="section-title">
                    <i class="fas fa-calendar-alt me-2"></i>Data Period
                </div>
                <p class="mb-3">Weekly update</p>
                
                <div class="section-title">
                    <i class="fas fa-database me-2"></i>Data Source
                </div>
                <p class="mb-2">Data originally from:</p>
                <p class="mb-2">
                    The core of its functionality relies on the Google YouTube Data API and Google YouTube Analytics API.
                    <br>
                    <a href="https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3" target="_blank" class="text-decoration-none">
                        <i class="fas fa-external-link-alt me-1"></i>
                        https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3
                    </a>
                </p>
                <p class="mb-3">
                    Accessed via: 
                    <a href="https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3" target="_blank" class="text-decoration-none">
                        <i class="fas fa-external-link-alt me-1"></i>
                        Google YouTube Data API
                    </a>
                </p>
                
                <div class="section-title">
                    <i class="fas fa-quote-left me-2"></i>Citation
                </div>
                <p class="mb-2">To cite this dashboard:</p>
                <div class="citation-text">
                    Zeleke,Y.(2026). Debre Berhan Holy Trinity EOTC Dallas-TX Dashboard [github.io]. 
                    <a href="https://github.com/yihun/eotc-youtube-channels" target="_blank" class="text-decoration-none">
                        https://github.com/yihun/eotc-youtube-channels
                    </a>
                </div>
                
                <div class="section-title mt-4">
                    <i class="fas fa-user-circle me-2"></i>Credits
                </div>
                <p class="mb-0">
                    <strong>Designed by:</strong> Yihun Zeleke, 2026
                </p>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-footer">
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">
                    <i class="fas fa-times me-2"></i>Close
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bootstrap/5.3.0/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
```

```{r}
#| context: setup
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| inlcude: false

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(gt)
library(bslib)
library(bsicons)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)
library(showtext)
library(ggtext)
library(tidytext)
library(echarts4r)
library(stringr)
library(plotly)
source(here::here("scripts/data_cleaning_001.R"))
source(here::here("scripts/theme_and_function.R"))

font_add_google("Libre Franklin", "franklin")
showtext_auto()
showtext_opts(dpi = 300)
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Libre Fraklin"))

format_number <- function(x, digits = 2) {
  case_when(
    abs(x) >= 1e9 ~ paste0(round(x / 1e9, digits), "B"),
    abs(x) >= 1e6 ~ paste0(round(x / 1e6, digits), "M"),
    abs(x) >= 1e3 ~ paste0(round(x / 1e3, digits), "K"),
    TRUE ~ as.character(round(x, digits))
  )
}
```

## Row - Indicators Values {hieght="1%"}

```{r}
#| expandable: false
#| label: total-subsribers

subscribe_bell <- sprintf(
  '
<style>
  @keyframes pulse {
    0%%  { r: 2;   opacity: 0.9; }
    50%% { r: 3.5; opacity: 0.3; }
    100%% { r: 2;  opacity: 0.9; }
  }

  @keyframes ring {
    0%%   { transform: rotate(0deg);   }
    10%%  { transform: rotate(15deg);  }
    20%%  { transform: rotate(-12deg); }
    30%%  { transform: rotate(10deg);  }
    40%%  { transform: rotate(-8deg);  }
    50%%  { transform: rotate(5deg);   }
    60%%  { transform: rotate(-3deg);  }
    70%%  { transform: rotate(2deg);   }
    80%%  { transform: rotate(0deg);   }
    100%% { transform: rotate(0deg);   }
  }

  .bell-group {
    animation: ring 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    transform-origin: 8px 2px;   /* pivot at top of bell */
  }

  .notify-dot {
    animation: pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
    transform-origin: 8px 8px;
  }
</style>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="3.4em" height="3.4em"
     fill="currentColor"
     viewBox="0 0 16 16">

  <g class="bell-group">
    <!-- Bell body -->
    <path d="M8 16a2 2 0 0 0 2-2H6a2 2 0 0 0 2 2z
             M8 1.918l-.797.161A4.002 4.002 0 0 0 4 6
             c0 .628-.134 2.197-.459 3.742
             -.16.767-.376 1.566-.663 2.258
             h10.244c-.287-.692-.502-1.49-.663-2.258
             C12.134 8.197 12 6.628 12 6
             a4.002 4.002 0 0 0-3.203-3.92L8 1.917z"/>

    <!-- Pulsing dot — centered INSIDE the bell -->
    <circle cx="8" cy="8" r="2" fill="#ba1bcf" class="notify-dot"/>
  </g>
</svg>
'
)
value_box(
  title = "Total Subscribers",
  # value = scales::comma(channel_stats$subscribers),
  value = format_number(channel_stats$subscribers),
  showcase = htmltools::HTML(subscribe_bell),
  class = "border noExpandable",
  showcase_layout = c("top right")
)
```


```{r}
#| label: avarage-weekly-views

tv_views_icon <- sprintf(
  '
<style>
  @keyframes bar1 {
    0%%, 100%% { height: 2px; y: 6.5px; opacity: 0.6; }
    50%%       { height: 5px; y: 3.5px; opacity: 1;   }
  }
  @keyframes bar2 {
    0%%, 100%% { height: 3px; y: 5.5px; opacity: 0.7; }
    50%%       { height: 6px; y: 2.5px; opacity: 1;   }
  }
  @keyframes bar3 {
    0%%, 100%% { height: 2px; y: 6.5px; opacity: 0.5; }
    50%%       { height: 4px; y: 4.5px; opacity: 1;   }
  }

  .tv-bar {
    fill: #2b0ba1;
    rx: 0.4px;
    animation-duration: 1.4s;
    animation-timing-function: ease-in-out;
    animation-iteration-count: infinite;
  }
  .b1 { animation-name: bar2; animation-delay: 0.0s; }
  .b2 { animation-name: bar1; animation-delay: 0.2s; }
  .b3 { animation-name: bar3; animation-delay: 0.4s; }
  .b4 { animation-name: bar2; animation-delay: 0.6s; }
  .b5 { animation-name: bar1; animation-delay: 0.8s; }
</style>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="3.5em" height="3.5em"
     fill="currentColor"
     viewBox="0 0 16 16">

  <!-- TV screen bezel -->
  <rect x="1" y="2" width="14" height="10" rx="1.5" ry="1.5"
        fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- Inner screen -->
  <rect x="2" y="3" width="12" height="8" rx="0.8" ry="0.8"
        fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="none"/>

  <!-- Stand base -->
  <line x1="5.5" y1="12" x2="10.5" y2="12"
        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <!-- Stand neck -->
  <line x1="8" y1="12" x2="8" y2="13.5"
        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <!-- Stand feet -->
  <line x1="6" y1="13.5" x2="10" y2="13.5"
        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- Animated visualizer bars -->
  <rect class="tv-bar b1" x="3.2"  y="6.5" width="1.2" height="2"/>
  <rect class="tv-bar b2" x="4.9"  y="5.5" width="1.2" height="3"/>
  <rect class="tv-bar b3" x="6.6"  y="6.5" width="1.2" height="2"/>
  <rect class="tv-bar b4" x="8.3"  y="5.5" width="1.2" height="3"/>
  <rect class="tv-bar b5" x="10.0" y="6.5" width="1.2" height="2"/>
</svg>
'
)
value_box(
  title = "Average Weekly Views",
  value = format_number(mean(videos$views)),
  showcase = htmltools::HTML(tv_views_icon),
  class = "border noExpandable",
  showcase_layout = c("top right"),
)
```

```{r}

#| expandable: false
#| label: total-views

eye_icon <- sprintf(
  '
<style>
  /* Slow, natural blink every 6s */
  @keyframes blink {
    0%%, 92%%, 100%% { transform: scaleY(1);   }
    96%%             { transform: scaleY(0.05); }
  }

  /* Very subtle wander — small, slow, relaxed */
  @keyframes wander {
    0%%   { transform: translate(0px,   0px);   }
    25%%  { transform: translate(-1px,  0.3px); }
    50%%  { transform: translate(0px,   0px);   }
    75%%  { transform: translate(0.8px, 0.2px); }
    100%% { transform: translate(0px,   0px);   }
  }

  .eye-group {
    animation: blink 6s ease-in-out infinite;
    transform-origin: 8px 8px;
  }

  .pupil-group {
    animation: wander 8s ease-in-out infinite;
    transform-origin: 8px 8px;
  }
</style>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="3.5em" height="3.5em"
     fill="currentColor"
     viewBox="0 0 16 16">

  <g class="eye-group">
    <!-- Eye outline -->
    <path d="M16 8s-3-5.5-8-5.5S0 8 0 8s3 5.5 8 5.5S16 8 16 8z
             M1.173 8a13.133 13.133 0 0 1 1.66-2.043C4.12 4.668 5.88 3.5 8 3.5
             c2.12 0 3.879 1.168 5.168 2.457A13.133 13.133 0 0 1 14.828 8
             a13.133 13.133 0 0 1-1.66 2.043C11.879 11.332 10.12 12.5 8 12.5
             c-2.12 0-3.879-1.168-5.168-2.457A13.133 13.133 0 0 1 1.172 8z"
          fill="currentColor"/>

    <!-- Eye white -->
    <ellipse cx="8" cy="8" rx="4.8" ry="3.2" fill="white"/>

    <!-- Pupil group -->
    <g class="pupil-group">
      <!-- Iris -->
      <circle cx="8" cy="8" r="3" fill="#2b0ba1"/>
      <!-- Pupil -->
      <circle cx="8" cy="8" r="1.6" fill="#0a0520"/>
      <!-- Catchlights -->
      <circle cx="9" cy="7" r="0.55" fill="white" opacity="0.9"/>
      <circle cx="7.2" cy="8.8" r="0.3" fill="white" opacity="0.5"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
'
)
value_box(
  title = "Total Views",
  showcase = htmltools::HTML(eye_icon),
  value = format_number(channel_stats$total_views),
  class = "border noExpandable",
  showcase_layout = c("top right")
)

```

```{r}

#| label: total-vides

youtube_icon = sprintf(
  '
<style>
  @keyframes blink {
    0%%, 20%%, 40%%, 60%%, 80%%, 100%% { opacity: 1; }
    10%%, 30%%, 50%%, 70%%, 90%% { opacity: 0; }
  }
  .play-button {
    fill: #ff0000;
    animation: blink 3.5s infinite;
    transform-origin: center;
  }
  .background {
    fill: #C0C0C0;  /* medium gray */
    rx: 4;
    ry: 4;
  }
</style>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="3.5em" height="3.5em" viewBox="0 0 24 24" >
  <!-- Background rounded rectangle -->
  <rect class="background" x="1" y="6" width="22" height="12" rx="4" ry="4" />
  <!-- Play triangle -->
  <polygon class="play-button" points="10,9 16,12 10,15" />
</svg>
'
)
youtube_icon <- sprintf(
  '
<style>
  /* Subtle background pulse — darkens slightly like a hover */
  @keyframes bg-breathe {
    0%%, 100%% { opacity: 0.85; }
    50%%       { opacity: 1;    }
  }

  /* Play button: scale-pop every few seconds like a heartbeat */
  @keyframes play-pop {
    0%%, 70%%, 100%% { transform: scale(1);    opacity: 1;    }
    80%%             { transform: scale(1.25); opacity: 1;    }
    85%%             { transform: scale(0.95); opacity: 1;    }
    90%%             { transform: scale(1.1);  opacity: 1;    }
    95%%             { transform: scale(1);    opacity: 1;    }
  }

  /* Ripple ring that expands from the play button */
  @keyframes ripple {
    0%%  { r: 4;  opacity: 0.6; }
    100%% { r: 11; opacity: 0;   }
  }

  .yt-bg {
    animation: bg-breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  .play-btn {
    fill: white;
    animation: play-pop 3s ease-in-out infinite;
    transform-origin: 12px 12px;
  }

  .ripple {
    fill: none;
    stroke: #ff0000;
    stroke-width: 1;
    animation: ripple 3s ease-out infinite;
    transform-origin: 12px 12px;
  }

  .ripple-2 {
    animation-delay: 0.5s;
  }
</style>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="3.5em" height="3.5em"
     viewBox="0 0 24 24">

  <!-- Ripple rings behind everything -->
  <circle class="ripple"         cx="12" cy="12" r="4" opacity="0"/>
  <circle class="ripple ripple-2" cx="12" cy="12" r="4" opacity="0"/>

  <!-- YouTube red rounded rect -->
  <rect class="yt-bg"
        x="1" y="6" width="22" height="12" rx="4" ry="4"
        fill="#ff0000"/>

  <!-- White play triangle -->
  <polygon class="play-btn" points="10,9 17,12 10,15"/>
</svg>
'
)


value_box(
  title = "Total Videos",
  showcase = htmltools::HTML(youtube_icon),
  value = format_number(channel_stats$total_videos),
  class = "border noExpandable",
  showcase_layout = c("top right")
)
```

## Row - Plots: Themes {height="51%"}

### Column - Monthly View Trends

```{r}
#| label: videos-monthly-trends
#| fig-height: 3.5
#| fig-width: 8

videos <- videos |>
  mutate(month = month(published_at, label = TRUE), year = year(published_at))

dark_gregy = "#4E4E4E"
custom_colors <- c(
  "2019" = "#ad2831",
  "2020" = "#845EC2",
  "2021" = "#ff5b00",
  "2022" = "#ff8f00",
  "2023" = "#ffc302",
  "2024" = "#fdae61",
  "2025" = "#1f77b4"
)

base_plot_1 <- videos |>
  group_by(month, year) |>
  summarise(total_view = sum(views)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(year >= 2019) |>
  ggplot(aes(
    x = factor(month),
    y = total_view,
    group = year,
    color = factor(year),
    text = paste(
      'Year:',
      year,
      '\nMonth:',
      month,
      "\nTotal Viwes: ",
      label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())(total_view)
    )
  )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(shape = 16, alpha = 0.75, stroke = 2) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Total Views", fill = "Year", color = "Year") +
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(color = 'white'),
    text = element_text(size = 15, color = "white"),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = dark_gregy, color = dark_gregy),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "white"),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "white"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(colour = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "white"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#E2E6ED50", color = "white"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = dark_gregy)
  )

# base_plot_1

ggplotly(base_plot_1, tooltip = 'text') |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE) |>
  layout(
    xaxis = list(
      tickfont = list(size = 10)
    ),
    legend = list(font = list(size = 12)),
    title = "Monthly View Trends"
  )

```


### Column - Comment Sentiment: Most Popular Words

```{r}

#| label: sentiment-wordcloud
#| fig-height: 3.5
#| fig-width: 8

clean_text = comments |>
  mutate(
    cleaned = comment |>
      str_remove_all("http[s]?://\\S+") |> # Remove URLs
      str_remove_all("[[:digit:]]+") |> # Remove numbers
      #str_remove_all("[A-Za-z]+") |>   # Remove English
      str_remove_all("[[:punct:]]") |> # Remove punctuation
      str_remove_all("[\\p{So}\\p{Cn}]") |> # Remove symbols/emojis
      str_squish() # Remove extra spaces
  )


word_freq <- clean_text %>%
  unnest_tokens(word, cleaned, token = "words") %>%
  #filter(str_detect(word, "[\u1200-\u137F]")) %>%  # Keep only Amharic script
  count(word, sort = TRUE) |>
  filter(n > 1)

# plot
word_freq |>
  e_color_range(n, color) |>
  e_charts() |>
  e_cloud(word, n, color, shape = "circle", sizeRange = c(5, 100)) |>
  e_theme('dark') |>
  e_title("Comment Sentiment: Most Popular Words", left = "center", top = "1%")

```

## Row - charts {height="49%"}

### Column - Total Views by Year

```{r}
#| label: views-year-chart
#| fig-height: 3.5
#| fig-width: 8

year_colors = c(
  "2018" = "#845ec2",
  "2019" = "#ad2831",
  "2020" = "#845EC2",
  "2021" = "#ff5b00",
  "2022" = "#ff8f00",
  "2023" = "#ffc302",
  "2024" = "#fdae61",
  "2025" = "#1f77b4"
)

base_plot_2 <- videos |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarise(tot_views = sum(views)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(year = factor(year)) |>
  ggplot(aes(
    year,
    tot_views,
    fill = year,
    text = paste(
      'Year:',
      year,
      "\nTotal View: ",
      label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())(tot_views)
    )
  )) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(title = "", y = "Total Views", x = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = year_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())
  ) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  custom_theme()

# base_plot_2

ggplotly(base_plot_2, tooltip = 'text') |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE) |>
  layout(
    xaxis = list(
      tickfont = list(size = 12)
    ),
    #legend = list(font = list(size = 12)),
    title = "Total Views by Year"
  )

```

### Column - Views by Service Type

```{r}
#| label: views-by-service
#| fig-height: 4.5
#| fig-width: 8

base_plot_3 <- videos |>
  group_by(service_cat) |>
  summarise(total_view = sum(views)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(
    service_cat = forcats::fct_reorder(service_cat, total_view),
    highlight = ifelse(service_cat != "Other Services", "#1261A0", "grey17")
  ) |>
  mutate(
    clr = case_when(
      service_cat == "Other Services" ~ '#1A0045',
      service_cat == "Easter Season" ~ "#260054",
      service_cat == "Miltan" ~ "#330064",
      service_cat == "Wudasie Mariam" ~ "#3F0073",
      service_cat == "Sermon/Teaching" ~ "#9066AF",
      service_cat == "Tselot Zeserk" ~ "#7F4DA4"
    )
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(
    x = service_cat,
    y = total_view,
    fill = clr,
    text = paste(
      'Service:',
      service_cat,
      "\nTotal Viwes: ",
      label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())(total_view)
    )
  )) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  labs(title = "Views by Service Type", y = "Total Views", x = "") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())
  ) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  coord_flip() +
  custom_theme()

# base_plot_3

ggplotly(base_plot_3, tooltip = "text") |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE) |>
  layout(
    xaxis = list(
      tickfont = list(size = 8)
    ),
    legend = list(font = list(size = 8))
    #  title = "Total Views by Year"
  ) |>
  add_annotations(
    x = 1,
    y = 0.98, # Position (relative to plot area)
    xref = "paper",
    yref = "paper",
    text = "ℹ️", # Info icon
    showarrow = FALSE,
    font = list(size = 20),
    bgcolor = "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)",
    bordercolor = "white",
    borderwidth = 1,
    hovertext = paste(
      "<b>Other Services:</b><br>",
      "There are different service themes under this category \nwhich I couldn't classify into a known category"
    ),
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "white",
      bordercolor = "black",
      font = list(size = 12)
    )
  )

```
